meta.name: [User Guide for Agencies] High opportunity product pool

detail.title: [User Guide for Agencies] High opportunity product pool
detail.content:
As a TikTok Affiliate Program (TAP) agency, finding products that are likely to perform well across different campaign types takes time. The High opportunity product pool helps solve this problem. ## What It Is The High opportunity product pool is an aggregator tool that brings together products with strong sales and commission potential from all campaign types - Seller, Agency, Exclusive TikTok shop, and more. ## Key Features and Benefits 1. **Find Products That Perform**: Access carefully selected products from all your campaigns in one tab. Instead of searching through multiple campaign types separately, you'll spot promising products quickly. 2. **Choose Products With Confidence**: See products from different campaigns side-by-side and easily identify ones with attractive commission rates. Add them to your campaigns with just a few clicks. 3. **Run Better Campaigns**: Focus on products chosen for their performance potential. Add them to your campaigns easily and spend less time searching for good options. 4. **Work Well with Creators**: Give products to creators and set their commission rates in one place. Create and share product lists directly through the platform instead of sending individual links from different campaign types. ## How it works **Step 1:** If you already have a TikTok Shop Partner Center account, navigate to Product Management and select high opportunity products. You will be able to search for products by name/id/shopname/shopcode/campaign name/campaign id. And it supports batch search by Product id.
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/d074efb18f814328bc677443f860f099~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) **Step 2:** Use the advanced filters for more granular results. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/b7b7de1290264a8195ff22a7930a2235~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) **Step 3:** A product could belong to multiple campaigns, choose the campaign you would like to join and click "Select"
> How to view Removed Products & Status? > **Step 4:** Once you have selected the product and joined the campaign, the product will appear under Selected Products and you can set your commission ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/40772885cf05414c8decb9fd8a3f4464~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/dd0dd143b14a48949eeaa79a97296605~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) **Step 5:** You can create a product list by selecting multiple products and copying the link and sending it to creators ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/99ccf715689645f0bdb5219387ccf017~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/1b22dfe9d9e84a8182e874a187750c31~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) **Creator's Experience:** If you send the creator a product list, they will see a list of products. If you send them just one product, they will see that single product. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/e1abe350426a4c658aa6541cbfaefa5c~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/02121d5cf4e84df29f383ddfec012a76~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ## Q&A ### How to view Removed Products & Status? 1. When go to the Product Pool page, I can see products that have been removed. 1. Product Unavailable in All Campaigns: Then its status is shown as “Unavailable” directly on the list. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/3fbb58d9a0304b70962524a53b5b7b10~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) 2. Product Available in Some Campaigns: When I click on such a product, Then I am taken to a detail page that shows its per-campaign availability status (“Available” or “Unavailable”).
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/8a314301f877492b84b1f5dc73136a21~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/dcf080acb3234bd2a5754ea39cec1166~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
